arts.ttl: Tottenham and Newcastle have same player ‘on top of list’ – Transfer won’t be entertained for ‘less than €30m’
arts.sum: Two months ago, we covered claims from France which stated Newcastle United are chasing Abdukodir Khusanov. Earlier this month, Le10 Sport reported Tottenham Hotspur are in the picture for the RC Lens player. Saturday’s edition of La Voix du Nord mentions Tottenham and Newcastle interest when discussing the 20-year-old’s growth at the Ligue 1 side. The post Tottenham and Newcastle have same player ‘on top of list’ – Transfer won’t be entertained for ‘less than €30m’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Potential new Tottenham investor is “perfect fit” as both parties “never manage to deliver”
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur chairman, Daniel Levy, is looking for new investment into the club, and may have found the perfect partner to work with in North London. On the pitch, the Lilywhites need to do an awful lot better, with one player unlikely to be signed after a u-turn by Ange Postecoglou. Daniel Levy could get […] The post Potential new Tottenham investor is “perfect fit” as both parties “never manage to deliver” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Definitely': Ange Postecoglou says he has decided that £8.5m Tottenham talent will play vs Southampton
Tottenham won’t sign £8.5m international after Postecoglou u-turn
arts.sum: After an underwhelming performance against Rangers it seems Timo Werner’s days at Tottenham are numbered and Ange Postecoglou has ruled out a permanent switch for the German international. The Spurs manager’s ire after the Europa League encounter was clear for all to see, and there was never going to be a way back after Werner […] The post Tottenham won’t sign £8.5m international after Postecoglou u-turn appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Lucas Bergvall decision made as £165k-a-week man drops out: Tottenham predicted XI v Southampton
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will be desperate to get a win on board when they head to Southampton in Sunday night’s Premier League clash on the south...

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Southampton with Bergvall and Spence questions
arts.sum: Postecoglou has some fresh players to bring in - or fresher at least - with Dominic Solanke, Pape Matar Sarr and Dejan Kulusevski all having been rested from the starting line-up. Gold's team: Forster; Spence, Gray, Dragusin, Udogie; Sarr, Bergvall, Maddison; Kulusevski, Solanke, Son.

arts.ttl: 'He did it': Ange Postecoglou thinks he knows the real reason why Antonio Conte blasted Spurs in his 2023 rant
Ange Postecoglou delivers Lucas Bergvall verdict and Timo Werner Tottenham squad and loan answers
arts.sum: "He has reacted really well and understood, 'it is a big game, big atmosphere, I need to do things a little bit differently,' and he's adjusted, worked hard at training and I think he's made a real impact in the last two games; he has come on with his calmness and better understanding of the way we want to play. At a time when a number of experienced players are struggling to make a big impact on the pitch in Tottenham's hour of need, the boss was asked if his message was inadvertently aimed at other senior players too .

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou fights on as Tottenham return to scene of Antonio Conte rant
arts.sum: A 3-3 draw at Southampton in March 2023 proved to be Conte’s final match in charge of Spurs after a post-match tirade against his players and board.
